data.requirement: Aggregate per-match performance metrics (runs, balls faced, wickets, strike rate) for individual players from detailed_player_data, enriched with match context (venue, season, team) from match_summary
data.reason: Consistency analysis requires tracking variability of performance indicators across matches. Linking detailed stats with match metadata enables context-aware evaluation.

data.requirement: Calculate rolling averages and standard deviations for key metrics across 5-match windows to identify performance streaks
data.reason: Temporal consistency patterns are better revealed through sliding window analysis than static aggregates, exposing hot/cold streaks.

data.requirement: Create player clusters based on covariance patterns between runs distribution (CV%), strike rate stability, and wickets/match deviation
data.reason: Grouping players by multidimensional consistency patterns enables comparative analysis beyond individual metrics.

data.requirement: Normalize match-level performance metrics against career averages to compute deviation scores for comparison across players
data.reason: Standardized deviation scores allow fair comparison between players with different baseline performance levels.

visualization.requirement: Small multiples of line charts showing temporal performance trends for selected metrics, aligned by match sequence
visualization.reason: Enables visual comparison of consistency patterns across multiple metrics while preserving temporal context.

visualization.requirement: Bivariate heatmap mapping venues (rows) to opponents (columns) with color encoding performance deviation from player average
visualization.reason: Reveals contextual consistency patterns against specific opponents and locations through 2D correlation.

visualization.requirement: Radial plots showing directional variance of key metrics from career averages for selected players
visualization.reason: Alternative visualization for multivariate consistency assessment, emphasizing magnitude/direction of deviations.

visualization.requirement: Connected scatterplot matrix with brushing to explore correlations between different consistency metrics
visualization.reason: Enables discovery of relationships between variability in different performance dimensions.

interaction.requirement: Dynamic band selection on temporal charts to define/match performance streak patterns across players
interaction.reason: Allows users to define consistency thresholds and find similar patterns in the dataset.

interaction.requirement: Auto-highlight matching clusters when hovering over players in any view
interaction.reason: Maintains analytical context by showing relationships between individual players and identified consistency groups.

interaction.requirement: Filter-by-example interaction where selecting a player's performance pattern auto-filters others with similar variance signatures
interaction.reason: Enables similarity-based exploration of consistency characteristics across the player pool.

interaction.requirement: Metadata lens overlay showing match context details when hovering over temporal performance points
interaction.reason: Provides on-demand context for performance deviations without cluttering primary visualizations.
